reviewReply.comment: Thank you! We’re glad you had a great experience. Hope to see you again soon.

reviews.comment:
Coffee Island Beyond, in GK 2, is a fantastic spot and one of the best cafés in this area. The food was consistently delicious and the coffee was excellent.

What makes the experience even better is the staff — warm, attentive, and genuinely welcoming, which adds a lot to the overall vibe. It is a great place to relax, catch up, or simply enjoy a well-made coffee and good food.

reviewReply.comment: We’re glad you enjoyed the food, coffee, and warm hospitality. It’s great to hear we could be a relaxing spot to unwind and catch up. Looking forward to welcoming you again soon.

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/13380444637775966918/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oM1oyOVNNVFZEZEZCRVkyOVBSak50YTFrMk4xRRAB

reviewReply.comment: Five stars and a whole lot of love, grateful for your support!

reviews.comment:
Pleasantly SURPRISED! I hadn’t heard of this place till a friend suggested we go here . I was more keen for my Subko at Sidecar or Libertario . Glad to report my experience was better than any of their other competition in GK2 . The Akuri eggs were light and delish ! I ordered cortado twice on the same visit . Huge shoutout to their extremely cheerful and hospitable staff Jasmin and Diya . My 5 star experience would be incomplete without these girls’ ace service and with a smile .
They’ve found a loyalist in me and I will be frequenting this place.

reviewReply.comment: Delighted to hear you were pleasantly surprised and that the experience stood out for you! Great to know the Akuri toast, cortado, and warm hospitality made such an impression. We truly appreciate the love and look forward to welcoming you back many more times. ☕

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly disappointed to hear that your visit didn’t reflect the welcoming experience we strive to create. Your observations about the service and atmosphere have been noted and shared with our team for immediate attention.
We do hope you’ll consider giving us another opportunity. We’d love the chance to connect with you and ensure you experience Coffee Island the way it’s meant to be.

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/13380444637775966918/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT200dGJrODVlR0YyTUd4NVFVWk5ORXQ0Y1Uxc1MwRRAB

reviews.comment:
We went for weekly meetup there.
1. I had to order but couldn't understand what to, there weren't many things available.
2. I asked for waitress to connect me the wifi and for payment but it failed for continuous half an hour. I didn't knew what to do. Then I saw I had to fill form for wifi first, why she didn't tell me that?
3. I ordered aglio pasta, it came very late, small portion, no red sauce it was completely naked, and tasteless ofcourse. I was so irritated and hungry by the time that I poured ketchup and seasonings and ate hurriedly. I knew they will say this is how we make our pasta, wasting more time.
4. No toilet paper in washroom, common toilet as well.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet expectations. We hope you’ll consider giving us another try. We’d love the chance to make it right and offer you the experience Coffee Island is known for.
Please DM us your contact details on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.

reviews.comment: Beautiful and vibrant place to work with a cup of coffee. If you go now, you may even get a free sticker which is really cool.

reviewReply.comment: Glad you enjoyed the vibrant space and coffee! Creating a cozy work-friendly atmosphere with little surprises like stickers is all part of the Coffee Island experience. Hope to see you back for more coffee and creativity. ☕✨

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/13380444637775966918/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0SWVUQTVOa3gxUkhGalJXUjVUekpxVFVwMUxWRRAB

reviewReply.comment: Five stars and a whole lot of love, grateful for your support!

reviews.comment: This cafe is a true gem! From the moment you walk in, you're greeted with a warm and inviting atmosphere. The decor is charming, with a perfect blend of modern and cozy elements. The coffee is exceptional, with a rich aroma and a smooth, balanced flavor that truly hits the spot. Whether you're stopping by for a quick coffee or settling in for a brunch, this cafe is a must-visit.

reviewReply.comment: We’re delighted to know the ambience, design, and coffee experience stood out for you! Creating a space that feels both welcoming and memorable, whether for a quick cup or a relaxed brunch, is exactly what we strive for. Looking forward to brewing more great moments for you at Coffee Island! ☕✨
